name: moltamp-site
description: Landing page for Moltamp — skinnable shell for Claude Code

scripts.db:migrate: wrangler d1 execute moltamp-db --local --file=migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute moltamp-db --local --file=migrations/0002_community_skins.sql && wrangler d1 execute moltamp-db --local --file=migrations/0003_phase2.sql && wrangler d1 execute moltamp-db --local --file=migrations/0004_ratings.sql
scripts.db:migrate:prod: wrangler d1 execute moltamp-db --file=migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute moltamp-db --file=migrations/0002_community_skins.sql && wrangler d1 execute moltamp-db --file=migrations/0003_phase2.sql && wrangler d1 execute moltamp-db --file=migrations/0004_ratings.sql

author: Peter Hough
